positive: A highly stylized and symmetrical mandala-inspired illustration featuring elements of botanical symmetry, celestial geometry, and deep sea life. The composition must be centered and contained within a cohesive circular frame. Use a high-contrast, single-color linocut or woodcut etching style with clean, solid silhouettes and fine, intricate linework. Primary palette should emphasize deep indigo, forest green, and ivory white. The style must be graphic, bold, and highly scalable, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Showcase stylized lotus flowers, crescent moons, geometric knots, and flowing vine patterns. Clean, balanced, and visually impactful.
negative: blurry, artifact, jpeg artifacts, amateur drawing, noise, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, gradient, 3d render, oil paint
